sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n112036" key="fo/lues" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φόλυες</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κύνες,</foreign> expld. as <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πυρροί,</foreign> with black mouths, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0239.tlg002:98" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antim.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">98</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
